cards.zhCN: 你肯定？ / 你肯唔肯定呀？

example.cantonese: nei5 hang2 ding6 nei5 ge3 daap3 on3?
example.english: Are you sure of your answer?

cards.cantonese: nei5 zung1 m4 zung1 ji3 ... aa3?
cards.english: Are you fond of...? / Do you like...?

example.cantonese: nei5 zung1 m4 zung1 ji3 coeng3 K aa3?

cards.english: What do you want to do?

example.cantonese: nei5 ting1 jat6 soeng2 zou6 me1 aa3?
example.english: What do you want to do tomorrow?

example.cantonese: ngo5 soeng2 heoi3 baa1 laai1 mong6 leoi5 hang4.
example.english: I want to travel to Palawan.

example.cantonese: ngo5 dei6 heoi3 tai2 din6 jing2 laa1.
ngo5 zung1 ji3 sik6 je5.
ngo5 zan1 hai6 hou2 leng3, gong2 siu3 zaa3!
zeoi3 gan6 jau5 me1 baat3 gwaa3 aa3?
nei5 hai6 ngo5 ge3 ngau5 zoeng6.
nei5 tiu3 mou5 han2 lei6 hoi6.
nei5 dim2 aa3, gwai1 mat6?

cards.cantonese: nei5 zou6 me1 gung1 zok3 gaa3?

example.cantonese: nei5 hai2 hoeng1 gong2 zou6 me1 gung1 zok3 gaa3?
example.english: What is your job in Hong Kong?

example.cantonese: ngo5 zung6 zi2 hai6 jat1 go3 hok6 saang1.
example.english: I am still just a student.

example.cantonese: ngo5 jin6 zoi6 zoi6 baan6 gung1 sat1.
example.english: I am at the office now.

example.cantonese: ngo5 gung1 zok3 han2 leoi6.
ngo5 seoi1 jiu3 jau1 gaa3.

cards.english: I have a crush on you

example.cantonese: nei5 zi1 m4 zi1 aa3, ngo5 am3 lyun2 nei5.
example.english: Do you know that I have a crush on you?

cards.cantonese: sam1 dung6 / siu2 luk6 lyun6 zong6

example.cantonese: jan1 wai6 nei5, ngo5 gam2 dou3 sam1 dung6.
example.english: I'm feeling giddy because of you.

example.cantonese: faai3 wui4 gaa1 baa6, ngo5 soeng2 nei5 liu5.
example.english: Come home now, I miss you.

cards.cantonese: nei5 hai6 mai6 daan1 san1 aa3?

example.cantonese: nei5 daan1 san1 ding6 hai6 jau5 naam4 pang4 jau5 laa1?
example.english: Are you single or do you have a boyfriend?
example.zhTW: 你單身定係有男朋友喇？
example.zhCN: 你单身定系有男朋友喇？

cards.cantonese: ngo5 dei6 heoi3 joek3 wui6 laa1?

example.cantonese: dak1 m4 dak1 aa3, ngo5 dei6 ting1 jat6 heoi3 joek3 wui6?
example.english: Is it okay if we go on a date tomorrow?
example.zhTW: 得唔得呀，我哋聽日去約會？
example.zhCN: 得唔得呀，我哋听日去约会？

cards.cantonese: nei5 hai6 mai6 tung4 ngo5 sang1 mun6 hei3 aa3?

example.cantonese: dim2 gaai2 nei5 gam3 on1 zing6 ge3? nei5 tung4 ngo5 sang1 gan2 mun6 hei3 aa3?
example.english: Why are you so quiet? Are you sulking with me?
example.zhTW: 點解你咁安靜嘅？你同我生緊悶氣呀？
example.zhCN: 点解你咁安静嘅？你同我生紧闷气呀？

example.cantonese: nei5 hai6 mai6 nau1 ngo5 aa3?

cards.english: Let's make up / Let's be friends again

example.cantonese: hou2 laa1, ngo5 dei6 wo4 hou2 laa1.

cards.english: I'm sorry / Come on, forgive me

example.cantonese: deoi3 m4 zyu6 laa1, ngo5 m4 hai6 zyun1 dang1 gaa3.
example.english: I'm sorry, I didn't mean it.
example.zhTW: 對唔住啦，我唔係專登㗎。
example.zhCN: 对唔住啦，我唔系专登㗎。

example.cantonese: zi2 jiu3 saau2 mei4 hung3 haa5, keoi5 zau6 wui5 hou2 faan1.
example.english: Just coax him/her a bit, he/she will be fine.
example.zhTW: 只要稍微哄一下，佢就會好返。
example.zhCN: 只要稍微哄一下，佢就会好返。

cards.cantonese: jam2 sing3! / leon4 dou3 nei5 jam2 laa1

example.cantonese: jam2 sing3! leon4 dou3 nei5 jam2 laa1.
example.english: Cheers! It's your turn to drink.

example.cantonese: faa1 sang1 hou2 hou2 sik6, hou2 ngaam1 zou6 haa6 zau2 coi3.
example.english: Peanuts are delicious, good for drinking.
example.zhTW: 花生好好食，好啱做下酒菜。
example.zhCN: 花生好好食，好啱做下酒菜。

example.cantonese: gau3 liu5, ngo5 ji5 ging1 zeoi3 liu5.
kap1 ngo5 jat1 dim2 be1 zau2, jat1 dim2 dim2 zau6 hou2.
example.english: Give me beer, just a little bit.
example.zhTW: 給我一點啤酒，一點點就好。
example.zhCN: 给我一点啤酒，一点点就好。

cards.cantonese: saang1 jat6 faai3 lok6! / zuk1 ho6!

example.cantonese: zuk1 nei5 saang1 jat6 faai3 lok6!
nei5 zi1 m4 zi1 kam4 jat6 faat3 sang1 zo2 me1 si6 aa3?
example.english: Do you know what happened yesterday?
example.zhTW: 你知唔知琴日發生咗咩事呀？
example.zhCN: 你知唔知琴日发生咗咩事呀？

example.cantonese: ngo5 dei6 sik6 zo2 faan6, jin4 hau6 tai2 zo2 din6 jing2.
example.english: We ate, and then we watched a movie.
example.zhTW: 我哋食咗飯，然後睇咗電影。
example.zhCN: 我哋食咗饭，然后睇咗电影。

example.cantonese: keoi5 dat6 jin4 zau2 zo2 laa1.
goi1 sei2! ngo5 mong4 liu5 joek6 si4.
example.english: Damn it! I forgot the key.

example.cantonese: keoi5 jeng4 zo2? zan1 hai6 gaa3?

example.english: There is a goat in the farm.

cards.english: No money / Broke (Hole in the pocket)

example.cantonese: ngo5 ji4 gaa1 san1 mou4 fan1 man4.
example.english: I have no money on me right now.

cards.cantonese: gei3 zyu6 ngo5 ge3 waa6 / tit3 baan2 ding1 ding1
cards.zhTW: 記住我嘅話 / 鐵板釘釘
cards.zhCN: 记住我嘅话 / 铁板钉钉

example.cantonese: gei3 zyu6 ngo5 ge3 waa6, ngo5 wui5 faan1 lai4 gaa3.
example.english: Remember my words, I will come back.
example.zhTW: 記住我嘅話，我會返嚟㗎。
example.zhCN: 记住我嘅话，我会返嚟㗎。

cards.cantonese: syut3 waa6 haak1 bok6 / duk6 sit3

example.cantonese: ngo5 dei6 gaak3 lei4 leon4 se5 gong2 je5 hou2 haak1 bok6.
example.zhTW: 我哋隔籬鄰舍講嘢好刻薄。
example.zhCN: 我哋隔篱邻舍讲嘢好刻薄。

example.cantonese: hok6 zaap6 m4 hou2 zi2 jau5 saam1 fan1 zung1 jit6 dou6.
example.english: Don't learn with just three minutes of enthusiasm.
example.zhTW: 學習唔好只有三分鐘熱度。
example.zhCN: 学习唔好只有三分钟热度。

cards.cantonese: min5 koeng5 wu4 hau2 / wan2 jat1 jat6 sik6 jat1 jat6
cards.english: Living hand-to-mouth / Surviving day by day
cards.zhTW: 勉強糊口 / 搵一日食一日
cards.zhCN: 勉强糊口 / 搵一日食一日

example.cantonese: keoi5 dei6 gwo3 gan2 min5 koeng5 wu4 hau2 ge3 sang1 wut6.
example.english: They are living a hand-to-mouth life.
example.zhTW: 佢哋過緊勉強糊口嘅生活。
example.zhCN: 佢哋过紧勉强糊口嘅生活。

cards.cantonese: ping3 ming6 gung1 zok3 / zoeng6 ngau4 jat1 joeng6 gung1 zok3
cards.zhTW: 拼命工作 / 像牛一樣工作
cards.zhCN: 拼命工作 / 像牛一样工作

example.cantonese: keoi5 wai6 zo2 gaa1 ting4 ping3 ming6 gung1 zok3.
example.english: He/She works hard for the family.

cards.cantonese: jung4 ji6 soeng1 cyu3 / tou2 jan4 hei2 fun1
cards.english: Easy to get along with (Light blood)
cards.zhTW: 容易相處 / 討人喜歡
cards.zhCN: 容易相处 / 讨人喜欢

example.cantonese: ngo5 hou2 jung4 ji6 tung4 keoi5 soeng1 cyu3.
example.english: I get along with him/her very easily.

example.cantonese: ngo5 dei6 oi3 gaa1 ting4 ge3 maa1 maa1.
example.english: We love the mother of the family.

example.cantonese: a3 baa1 hou2 kan4 lik6.

cards.cantonese: man5 gam2 / bo1 lei1 sam1 (joeng4 cung1 pei4)
cards.zhTW: 敏感 / 玻璃心 (洋蔥皮)
cards.zhCN: 敏感 / 玻璃心 (洋葱皮)

example.cantonese: ngo5 go3 pang4 jau5 hou2 bo1 lei1 sam1.

cards.cantonese: siu2 tau1 / jung4 ji6 tau1 dung1 sai1 (sau2 joeng5)
cards.zhTW: 小偷 / 容易偷東西 (手癢)
cards.zhCN: 小偷 / 容易偷东西 (手痒)

example.cantonese: siu2 sam1, keoi5 wui5 tau1 je5.
example.english: Be careful, he/she will steal things.

cards.cantonese: zong1 lung4 zok3 aa2 (wo1 ji5 do2)

example.cantonese: m4 hou2 baan6 lung4.

cards.cantonese: bat1 ho2 nang4 faat3 sang1 ge3 si4
cards.english: When pigs fly / Highly unlikely (When the crow turns white)

example.cantonese: dang2 taai3 joeng4 sai1 bin1 sing1 hei2 ngo5 sin1 waan4 cin2 bei2 nei5.
example.english: I will return you the money when pigs fly.
example.zhTW: 等太陽西邊升起我先還錢畀你。
example.zhCN: 等太阳西边升起我先还钱畀你。

cards.cantonese: hong2 koi3 / lok6 jyu1 zo6 jan4 (zoeng1 hoi1 sau2 zoeng2)
cards.zhTW: 慷慨 / 樂於助人 (張開手掌)
cards.zhCN: 慷慨 / 乐于助人 (张开手掌)

example.cantonese: keoi5 deoi3 kung4 jan4 hou2 hong2 koi3.
example.english: He/She is very generous to the poor.

cards.cantonese: hau5 ngaan4 mou4 ci2 (lim5 pei4 hau5)

example.cantonese: keoi5 jau6 lai4 ze3 cin2, zan1 hai6 lim5 pei4 hau5.
example.english: He/She came to borrow money again, how shameless.
example.zhTW: 佢又嚟借錢，真係臉皮厚。
example.zhCN: 佢又嚟借钱，真系脸皮厚。

hou2 aa3, ngo5 jiu3 nei1 go3.

cards.english: To chill, lounge, or slack off
cards.zhTW: Hea (放鬆、消磨時間、打發時間)
cards.zhCN: Hea (放松、消磨时间、打发时间)

example.cantonese: ngo5 gam1 jat1 zi2 soeng2 hai2 uk1 kei2 hea.
example.english: I just want to chill at home today.

cards.english: To strike a cool pose or look handsome

example.cantonese: m4 sai2 cok1 laa3, ngo5 dei6 zi1 nei5 leng3 zai2 laa3.
example.english: No need to pose, we know you are handsome.
example.zhTW: 唔使chok啦，我哋知你靚仔喇。
example.zhCN: 唔使chok啦，我哋知你靓仔喇。

cards.english: To go offline / disappear from contact (literally diving)

example.cantonese: keoi5 hai2 go2 pang4 jau5 kwang4 zou2 cim4 seoi2 gam1 gau2.
example.english: He has been offline in that friend group chat for so long.
example.zhTW: 佢喺嗰個朋友群組潛水咁耐。
example.zhCN: 佢喺嗰个朋友群组潜水咁耐。

cards.english: To chat, gossip, or shoot the breeze (literally blowing water)

example.cantonese: ngo5 dei6 dou1 hai6 ceoi1 haa3 seoi2 ze1.

cards.english: To watch drama unfold / be a spectator (literally eating peanuts)

example.cantonese: ngo5 zi2 hai6 sik6 faa1 sang1 ze1, m4 gwaan1 ngo5 si3.
example.english: I'm just watching the drama, it's none of my business.
example.zhTW: 我只係食花生啫，唔關我事。
example.zhCN: 我只系食花生啫，唔关我事。

example.cantonese: ngo5 dei6 gam1 maan1 heoi3 bin1 dou6 maai5 sung3 aa3?
example.english: Where are we going to buy groceries tonight?
example.zhTW: 我哋今晚去邊度買餸呀？
example.zhCN: 我哋今晚去边度买餸呀？

cards.english: How much is it per catty?

example.cantonese: nei1 di1 coi3 gei2 do1 cin2 jat1 gan1 aa3?
example.english: How much are these vegetables per catty?

example.cantonese: nei1 tiu4 jyu4 hou2 san1 sin1.
lou5 baan2, peng4 di1 laa1, maai5 do1 di1 aa3.
example.english: Boss, make it cheaper, I'll buy more.

cards.english: Give a free green onion (a common wet market request)

example.cantonese: m4 goi1 sung3 fo1 cung1 laa1.
example.english: Please throw in a green onion for free.

cards.english: Hong Kong style milk tea (literally silk stocking milk tea)

example.cantonese: ngo5 soeng2 jam2 dung3 si1 mat6 naai5 caa4.
example.english: I want to drink iced Hong Kong style milk tea.

example.cantonese: nei1 dou6 ge3 bo1 lo4 jau4 hou2 leng3.
example.english: The pineapple bun with butter here is very good.

example.cantonese: jam2 caa4 jat1 ding3 jiu3 dim2 haa1 gaau2.
example.english: Going for dim sum must include ordering shrimp dumplings.

example.cantonese: ngo5 zui3 oi3 sik6 gaai1 bin1 ge3 gaai1 laat6 siu1 maai2.
example.english: I love eating street-side curry siu mai the most.
example.zhTW: 我最愛食街邊嘅咖喱燒賣。
example.zhCN: 我最爱食街边嘅咖喱烧卖。

example.cantonese: daan6 taat1 jiu3 sik6 jik6 ngaat3 ngaat3 ge3.
example.english: Egg tarts must be eaten piping hot.

example.cantonese: ting1 jat1 daa2 fung1 m4 sai2 faan1 hung1 laa3.
example.english: It's a typhoon tomorrow, no need to go to work.

example.cantonese: gwaa3 baat3 hou6 fung1 kau4 laa3, faai3 di1 faan1 uk1 laa1.
example.english: Typhoon Signal No. 8 is hoisted, go home quickly!
example.zhTW: 掛八號風球喇，快啲返屋企啦。
example.zhCN: 挂八号风球喇，快啲返屋企啦。

example.cantonese: ngoi6 min6 lok6 gan2 daai6 jyu5, m4 goi1 daai3 ze1.
example.english: It's raining heavily outside, please bring an umbrella.
example.zhTW: 外面落緊大雨，唔該帶遮。
example.zhCN: 外面落紧大雨，唔该带遮。

example.cantonese: gam1 jat1 ge3 tin1 hei3 zan1 hai6 sap1 zai6.
example.english: Today's weather is really humid and sticky.

example.cantonese: haak1 jyu5 gwaa3 gan2, faai3 di1 lau1 hai2 on1 cyun4 ge3 dei6 fong1.
example.english: The Black Rainstorm warning is active, hurry to a safe place.
example.zhTW: 黑雨掛緊，快啲留喺安全嘅地方。
example.zhCN: 黑雨挂紧，快啲留喺安全嘅地方。
